trial_title: Phase II study in heart failure with reduced ejection fraction

inclusion_quantitative.source_text: Left ventricular ejection fraction of 40% or less.
Systolic blood pressure of at least 100 mmHg.

inclusion_categorical.source_text: Chronic heart failure diagnosis for at least 6 months.

exclusion_quantitative.source_text: Systolic blood pressure greater than 180 mmHg.

unparseable: Adequate hepatic function is required, per investigator judgment.
